briefdescription.para: Relocation names for RISCV-specific relocations.

parameterdescription.para: immediate value (usually upper 20 or lower 12 bit)

briefdescription.para: Generate mask for immediate in B-type RISC-V instruction.

parameterdescription.para: immediate value, lower 12 bits used; due to alignment requirements, imm8[0] is implicitly 0

briefdescription.para: Generate mask for immediate in J-type RISC-V instruction.

parameterdescription.para: immediate value, lower 21 bits used; due to alignment requirements, imm8[0] is implicitly 0

briefdescription.para: Generate mask for immediate in S-type RISC-V instruction.
Generate mask for immediate in compressed J-type RISC-V instruction.

parameterdescription.para: immediate value, lower 12 bits used; due to alignment requirements, imm8[0] is implicitly 0

briefdescription.para: Generate mask for immediate in compressed B-type RISC-V instruction.

parameterdescription.para: immediate value, lower 9 bits used; due to alignment requirements, imm8[0] is implicitly 0

briefdescription.para: Clear immediate bits in B-type instruction.
Overwrite immediate in B-type instruction.
Clear immediate bits in J-type instruction.
Overwrite immediate in J-type instruction.
Clear immediate bits in S-type instruction.
Overwrite immediate in S-type instruction.
Clear immediate bits in compressed J-type instruction.
Overwrite immediate in compressed J-type instruction.
Clear immediate bits in compressed B-type instruction.
Overwrite immediate in compressed B-type instruction.
Clear immediate bits in U-type instruction.
Overwrite immediate in U-type instruction.
Clear immediate bits in I-type instruction.
Overwrite immediate in I-type instruction.
RISCV-Specific constants for ELF binaries.
